title: Leopold II of Belgium becomes King of the Belgians
fact: Leopold II was the second king of the Belgians from 1865 to 1909, and the founder and sole owner of the Congo Free State from 1885 to 1908.

title: Philippe of Belgium becomes King of the Belgians
fact: Philippe is King of the Belgians.

title: Leopold I of Belgium becomes King of the Belgians
fact: Leopold I was the first king of the Belgians, reigning from 21 July 1831 until his death in 1865.

title: Albert II of Belgium becomes King of the Belgians
fact: Albert II is a member of the Belgian royal family who reigned as King of the Belgians from 1993 until his abdication in 2013.

title: Leopold III of Belgium becomes King of the Belgians
fact: Leopold III was King of the Belgians from 23 February 1934 until his abdication on 16 July 1951.

title: Baudouin I of Belgium becomes King of the Belgians
fact: Baudouin was King of the Belgians from 17 July 1951 until his death in 1993.

title: Albert I of Belgium becomes King of the Belgians
fact: Albert I was King of the Belgians from 23 December 1909 until his death in 1934.
